name: Pineapple Fudge Chill
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate flavored low cal-milk beverage mix (I use)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the chocolate-flavored low-cal milk beverage mix, crushed pineapple with juice, vanilla extract, and to taste.
2. Blend until well combined.
3. Spread into a foil pan or cereal bowl.
4. Place in freezer until firm.
5. Note: A half medium banana, peeled and mashed can be used instead of the pineapple. Add a small amount of water to achieve the desired consistency for spreading.
6. 1 serving includes milk and fruit.
